title: Open Field Behavior in Mice
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cj5uo","text":"The open field test is widely used to assess spontaneous locomotor activity, exploratory behavior, and anxiety-like responses in rodents. In this fork, the test duration has been modified and the software used described.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"b795j","text":"Customize the settings on the ANY-maze software, including the type of animals used, parameters to be tracked, and calibration of the camera feed.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"d5uim","text":"Wear appropriate PPE as required by your institution. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"9tmoq","text":"Open field arena: 50 x 50 x 50 cm chambers","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"iiv4","text":"Video recording: A camera mounted above the chambers, adjusted to ensure full coverage of the arena. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bo2mq","text":"ANY-maze software (https://www.any-maze.com/)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":19,"length":25}],"data":{}},{"key":"4m88s","text":"70% ethanol spray and paper towel","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"E6F0588F56A211F08DDF0A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.any-maze.com"}}}}
steps: Place the mouse gently in the center of the open field arena.
The duration of each test session is 5 minutes, but may be changed depending on the experimental design.
After allotted time, stop the recording and return the mouse to its home cage.
Optional observation: Record the number of fecal boli and urine spots as additional indicators of anxiety.
Thoroughly clean the chambers with 70% ethanol between trials and after testing to eliminate odor cues from previous animals.
Habituate the mice for 45-60 min in the room where the testing will be performed.
Open the ANY-maze software and start a new experiment.
creator: Shenyu Zhai
